(SELECT count(*) FROM project_report_designs prd WHERE prd.project_id = p.project_id) AS project_report_designs

(SELECT count(*) FROM wms_services ws WHERE ws.project_id = p.project_id) AS wms_services
(SELECT count(*) FROM wms_layers wl WHERE wl.project_id = p.project_id) AS wms_layers
(SELECT count(*) FROM wfs_services wfs WHERE wfs.project_id = p.project_id) AS wfs_services
(SELECT count(*) FROM vector_layers vl WHERE vl.project_id = p.project_id) AS vector_layers

(SELECT count(*) FROM taxonomies t WHERE t.project_id = p.project_id) AS taxonomies
(SELECT count(*) FROM project_crs pc WHERE pc.project_id = p.project_id) AS crs
(SELECT count(*) FROM place_levels pl WHERE pl.project_id = p.project_id) AS place_levels

Teilprojekte mit Statistik;Subprojects with statistics;Sous-projets avec statistiques;Sottoprogetti con statistiche;project;false;"SELECT
s.subproject_id
s.label
s.start_year
s.end_year
(SELECT count(*) FROM goals g WHERE g.subproject_id = s.subproject_id) AS goals
(SELECT count(*) FROM subproject_reports sr WHERE sr.subproject_id = s.subproject_id) AS reports
(SELECT count(*) FROM subproject_taxa st WHERE st.subproject_id = s.subproject_id) AS taxa
(SELECT count(*) FROM subproject_users su WHERE su.subproject_id = s.subproject_id) AS users
(SELECT count(*) FROM files f WHERE f.subproject_id = s.subproject_id) AS files
(SELECT count(*) FROM observation_imports oi WHERE oi.subproject_id = s.subproject_id) AS observation_imports
(SELECT count(*) FROM observations o JOIN observation_imports oi ON oi.observation_import_id = o.observation_import_id WHERE oi.subproject_id = s.subproject_id) AS observations

(SELECT count(*) FROM observations o JOIN observation_imports oi ON oi.observation_import_id = o.observation_import_id WHERE oi.subproject_id = s.subproject_id AND o.place_id IS NULL AND o.not_to_assign = false) AS observations_to_assess

(SELECT count(*) FROM observations o JOIN observation_imports oi ON oi.observation_import_id = o.observation_import_id WHERE oi.subproject_id = s.subproject_id AND o.not_to_assign = true) AS observations_not_to_assign

(SELECT count(*) FROM observations o JOIN observation_imports oi ON oi.observation_import_id = o.observation_import_id WHERE oi.subproject_id = s.subproject_id AND o.place_id IS NOT NULL) AS observations_assigned
(SELECT count(*) FROM charts c WHERE c.subproject_id = s.subproject_id) AS charts
(SELECT count(*) FROM places p WHERE p.subproject_id = s.subproject_id AND p.level = 1) AS places_level_1
(SELECT count(*) FROM places p WHERE p.subproject_id = s.subproject_id AND p.level = 2) AS places_level_2
FROM subprojects s
WHERE s.project_id = $1
ORDER BY s.label";subproject_id
